name: Get Together Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a saucepan with water and add the rice. Bring the water to a boil and let the rice boil freely for 9 minutes or until it is cooked through.
2. Drain the rice and stir in the corn oil.
3. While cooking the rice, wash and cut all vegetables and ham into very small pieces. Mix the soy sauce and sugar together in a separate bowl.
4. Heat peanut oil in a wok or frying pan until smoking. Add onions and stir fry for 1 minute.
5. Add scallions and continue to fry for another 30 seconds.
6. Add ham, snow peas, sprouts, and rice to the pan. Stir fry for 3 minutes.
7. Push ingredients aside to make a hole in the center of the pan.
8. Crack the egg into the hole and beat to mix yellow and white. Stir the egg mixture throughout the other ingredients.
9. Make another hole and add soy sauce. Toss all ingredients together and continue frying for an additional 3-4 minutes.
10. Taste for seasoning and adjust with salt if necessary.
11. Serves 2.
